rulings.Case Title: J.D. HOPKINS VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Dismiss For Delay In Prosecution

rulings.Case Title: UNION PAPER BOX & PRINTING PRESS LIMITED VS. ARTISTIC STUDIOS, LTD., LLC A COLORADO LIMITED et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, DECEMBER 28, 2009, LINE 3, CROSS-DEFENDANT WILLIE LUI'S DEMURRER TO THIRD AMENDED CROSS-COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 11, 2010 PER AGREEMENT OF PARTIES. IN ADDITION, MOVING PARTY TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPY OF MOVING PAPERS (INCLUDING THE PROOF OF SERVICE ON THE DEMURRER). =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: LEADERS IN COMMUNITY ALTERNATIVES, INC. VS. G4S JUSTICE SERVICES, INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, DECEMBER 28, 2009, LINE 4, DEFENDANT G4S JUSTICE SERVICES, INC.'S DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. DEMURRER TO 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION FOR NEGLIGENT INTERFERENCE WITH PROSPECTIVE ECONOMIC RELATIONS, 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR NEGLIGENCE/NEGLIGENCE PER SE, AND 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR NEGLIGENT MISREPRESENTATION SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT WERE BUSINESS COMPETITORS AND DEFENDANT DID NOT OWE PLAINTIFF A DUTY OF CARE. (STOLZ V. WONG COMMUNICATIONS LIMITED PARTNERSHIP (1994) 25 CAL.APP.4TH 1811) THE PARTIES HAVE NO RELATIONSHIP WITH ONE ANOTHER SUCH AS THIRD PARTY BENEFICIARIES, AND PLAINTIFF CANNOT ESTABLISH A LEGAL DUTY. NO REASONABLE LIKELIHOOD THAT DEFECT CAN BE CURED BY AMENDMENT. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: JERRY THOMAS et al VS. INEZ ANDERSON et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, DECEMBER 28, 2009, LINE 5, DEFENDANT INEZ ANDERSON'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS GRANTED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND BASED ON PLAINTIFF'S NOTICE OF NON-OPPOSITION. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID BRADLOW et al VS. SAMUEL H SLOAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay Eviction Proceedings And To Dismiss
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, DECEMBER 28, 2009, LINE 14, DEFENDANT SAMUEL SLOAN'S Motion To Stay Eviction Proceedings And To Dismiss. OFF CALENDAR, NO PROOF OF SERVICE, MOVANT FAILED TO PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY IN COMPLIANCE WITH SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.6(B) AND THE COURT IS UNAWARE OF A CODE SECTION THAT ALLOWS FOR 7-DAYS NOTICE FOR THIS TYPE OF MOTION. =(302/CWW)

SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, DECEMBER 28, 2009, LINE 7, DEFENDANT JAMES MACDONALD'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND NOTICE FATALLY DEFECTIVE BECAUSE IT LACKS THE ADDRESS WHERE THE PAYMENT IS DUE. =(302/CWW)
